Question: Estimate $$\underset{x \rightarrow 1}{\text{lim}} \frac{\frac{1}{x} - 1}{x - 1}$$ using a table of functional values. Use a graph to confirm your estimate.
Use the graph of $$h ( x )$$ in Figure 2.16 to evaluate $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2}{\text{lim}} h \left(\right. x \left.\right) ,$$ if possible. Figure 2.16
Use a table of functional values to evaluate $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2}{\text{lim}} \frac{\left|\right. x^{2} - 4 \left|\right.}{x - 2} ,$$ if possible.

Use a table of functional values to estimate the following limits, if possible. $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2^{-}}{\text{lim}} \frac{\left|\right. x^{2} - 4 \left|\right.}{x - 2}$$ $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2^{+}}{\text{lim}} \frac{\left|\right. x^{2} - 4 \left|\right.}{x - 2}$$

Evaluate each of the following limits, if possible. Use a table of functional values and graph $$f ( x ) = 1 \text{/} x^{2}$$ to confirm your conclusion. $$\underset{x \rightarrow 0^{-}}{\text{lim}} \frac{1}{x^{2}}$$ $$\underset{x \rightarrow 0^{+}}{\text{lim}} \frac{1}{x^{2}}$$ $$\underset{x \rightarrow 0}{\text{lim}} \frac{1}{x^{2}}$$

Evaluate each of the following limits. Identify any vertical asymptotes of the function $$f ( x ) = \frac{1}{( x - 2 )^{3}} .$$ $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2^{-}}{\text{lim}} \frac{1}{\left(\left(\right. x - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{3}}$$ $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2^{+}}{\text{lim}} \frac{1}{\left(\left(\right. x - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{3}}$$ $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2}{\text{lim}} \frac{1}{\left(\left(\right. x - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{3}}$$
Answer: a. $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2^{-}}{\text{lim}} \frac{1}{\left(\left(\right. x - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{3}} = - \infty ;$$ b. $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2^{+}}{\text{lim}} \frac{1}{\left(\left(\right. x - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{3}} = + \infty ;$$ c. $$\underset{x \rightarrow 2}{\text{lim}} \frac{1}{\left(\left(\right. x - 2 \left.\right)\right)^{3}}$$ DNE. The line $$x = 2$$ is the vertical asymptote of $$f ( x ) = 1 \text{/} ( x - 2 )^{3} .$$
